languages.text: "Паскаль, ты будешь следить за праведностью опытов Эоганна. Вместе вы стабилизируете и улучшите сервиторов".
"Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."
languages.original_text: "Паскаль, ты будешь следить за праведностью опытов Эоганна. Вместе вы стабилизируете и улучшите сервиторов".

traits.locale_text: "Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."
"Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."

"Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."

languages.text: "Pasqal, Ihr werdet die Rechtschaffenheit von Eogunns Experimenten überwachen. Ihr werdet die Servitoren gemeinsam stabilisieren und verbessern."
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."

traits.locale_text: "Pasqal, Ihr werdet die Rechtschaffenheit von Eogunns Experimenten überwachen. Ihr werdet die Servitoren gemeinsam stabilisieren und verbessern."

languages.text: « Pasqal, je vous charge de superviser les expériences d'Eogunn. Ensemble, je suis {mf|sûr|sûre} que vous parviendrez à stabiliser et améliorer les servitors. »
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."

traits.locale_text: « Pasqal, je vous charge de superviser les expériences d'Eogunn. Ensemble, je suis {mf|sûr|sûre} que vous parviendrez à stabiliser et améliorer les servitors. »

languages.text: “帕斯卡，你负责监督伊奥贡实验的正当性。你们一起把机仆稳住，并加以改进。”
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."

traits.locale_text: “帕斯卡，你负责监督伊奥贡实验的正当性。你们一起把机仆稳住，并加以改进。”

languages.text: «Pasqal, supervisará la adecuación de los experimentos de Eogunn. Trabajen juntos para estabilizar y mejorar a los servidores».
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."

traits.locale_text: «Pasqal, supervisará la adecuación de los experimentos de Eogunn. Trabajen juntos para estabilizar y mejorar a los servidores».

languages.text: 「パスカル、君はエオガンの実験を監督するんだ。共にサーヴィターを安定させ、改良するのだ」
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."

traits.locale_text: 「パスカル、君はエオガンの実験を監督するんだ。共にサーヴィターを安定させ、改良するのだ」

languages.text: "Pasqal, Eogunn'un deneylerinin doğruluğunu denetleyeceksin. Birlikte hizmetörleri stabilize edecek ve geliştireceksiniz."
languages.original_text: "Pasqal, you will oversee the righteousness of Eogunn's experiments. Together, you will stabilise and improve the servitors."

traits.locale_text: "Pasqal, Eogunn'un deneylerinin doğruluğunu denetleyeceksin. Birlikte hizmetörleri stabilize edecek ve geliştireceksiniz."
